create_SelectedToolsManifest: create a SelectedToolsManifest instance to track core, MCP, and local tool selections during a session
review_SelectedToolsManifest: review the SelectedToolsManifest model to understand tool categorization fields for core, MCP, and local tools
summarize_SelectedToolsManifest: summarize the SelectedToolsManifest Pydantic model fields used for tracking tool discovery and selection state
